name: Two Hands Corp
business: Two Hands Corp, through its subsidiary Cuore Food Services, engages in wholesale food distribution, delivering bulk goods to food service businesses such as restaurants, hotels, and event planners. The company also plans to evaluate new opportunities in digital asset, fintech, and gig economy spaces.

exposures.sentence: The Company will continue to evaluate opportunities both inside and outside the food industry, including, but not limited to, ventures within the digital asset, fintech and gig economy spaces.
